description_long: This is a modern, light gray wooden bed frame with a minimalist design, featuring a high rectangular headboard and slightly curved side panels. The front of the bed includes two integrated storage drawers, seamlessly blending into the frame for added functionality. The side panels are gently contoured, providing a subtle decorative touch while maintaining a clean, contemporary look. The back panel is solid and extends the full width of the bed, offering structural support. The surface of the bed is flat and appears to lack a visible mattress or bedding, exposing the wood grain texture. The overall construction suggests durability and practicality, suitable for urban interiors or compact living spaces.
description: A light gray wooden bed frame with a high headboard, curved side panels, and two front storage drawers, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high headboard, curved side panels, and two integrated storage drawers at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved side panel and the thickness of the frame, with the headboard visible at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the full width of the headboard, with no visible drawers or storage.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the curved side panel and the headboard at the back.
